/usr/local/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/VeriSpeed_VST3.dir/objects.a
/usr/local/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/VeriSpeed_VST3.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/VeriSpeed_VST3.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/local/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -o VeriSpeed_artefacts/Release/VST3/VeriSpeed.vst3/Contents/x86_64-win/VeriSpeed.vst3 -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/VeriSpeed_VST3.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/VeriSpeed_VST3.dir/linkLibs.rsp
